message:
refactor: optimize state_meta_json and adopt lazy DB in TUI detail loading

src/lib.rs:
- state_meta_json: add allow_db_open parameter so the health command
  can compute state without opening the database (avoids slow path
  for quick health checks). When DB is skipped, fall back to
  index meta.json mtime for last_indexed_at timestamp.
- Track db_opened bool in state JSON output for diagnostics
- run_health: pass allow_db_open=false to avoid unnecessary DB open
- run_cli_search: pass allow_db_open=true (needs counts)
- run_stats: use lazy.path() instead of local db_path for consistency

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Remove unused PathBuf import (already imported at module level)

src/ui/tui.rs:
- Replace direct db_reader.as_ref() usage with ensure_db_reader()
  calls throughout: conversation detail loading, editor path
  preparation, source ID discovery, and workspace filter activation
- Lazy workspace loading triggered on first workspace filter use
  via ensure_known_workspaces()
- Consistent formatting of workspace_suggestions() calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
